title: Route PeriodAnalytics / RiskCommand / PCGovernance active or pilot back to disabled or limited mode

forbidden_actions: SQL edit finance snapshot body as source of truth

steps: Set SliceCutoverState.runtime_mode to rollback for PeriodAnalytics, RiskCommand, and PCGovernance.
Disable period.*, risk_command.enabled, pc_governance_full.enabled, admin.role_capability.enabled, and export.ledger.enabled feature flags or narrow them to zero percent.
Route PeriodAnalytics to disabled mode; keep existing period reviews and snapshots read-only.
Route RiskCommand to previous dashboard or limited risks until green shadow compare is restored.
Route PC Governance to limited read-only mode; keep Release Control Center visible for audit evidence.
Do not delete closed period snapshots, late adjustments, correction notes, risk snapshots, or export audit records.
validation_steps: Run invariant-runner for MR-10 P0 invariants.
Run shadow-compare-runner and confirm no red report exists before returning to pilot or active.
Confirm period.close.enabled is disabled for rolled-back scopes.
Confirm export.ledger.enabled is disabled or limited to audited admin-only access.
Confirm frozen snapshots and existing export audit remain visible after rollback.
